critical_do_not_touch: originus/_canon/ (R2 bucket — READ ONLY at runtime)
All 6 API routes (GET /health, GET /healthz, POST /enter-system, POST /buy, GET /status/:id, POST /stripe/webhook)
Cloudflare Worker routing (sentinelfortunellc v2 isApiRoute guard)
activate_user await calls — must never use create_task
deliver_tier_access await calls — must never use create_task
preserve_behavior: CRI embedding in Stripe checkout URLs
Local filesystem fallback for R2 reads: data/users/{id}/
Channel invite links stored in env vars (INVITE_RESET, INVITE_QUICK, INVITE_VAULT, INVITE_ENGINE, INVITE_ARCHITECT)
